basic_details.job_title: CUP Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellowship / Project Assistant Posts
basic_details.short_information: Central University of Punjab (CUP) Junior Research Fellowship / Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 27 May 2026 on the official website of the Central University of Punjab. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the CUP Junior Research Fellowship / Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years for all posts. Age relaxation is applicable subject to relaxation in accordance with official DBT rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s degree (M.Sc./M.Tech.) with at least 55% marks in Biotechnology, Botany, Molecular Biology, Bioinformatics, or relevant allied field of Life Sciences + NET/GATE/DBT-BET etc., B.Sc./B.Tech./M.Sc. with minimum 55% marks in Biotechnology, Botany, Molecular Biology, Bioinformatics or relevant allied disciplines
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellowship: Master’s degree (M.Sc./M.Tech.) with at least 55% marks (or equivalent grade) in Biotechnology, Botany, Molecular Biology, Bioinformatics, or a relevant allied field of Life Sciences from a recognized University/Institute. Candidates must have cleared National Eligibility Tests like CSIR-UGC NET (including Lectureship/Assistant Professorship/Category 3), GATE, or national-level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments/Agencies (such as DBT-BET, ICMR, DST, etc.) as mandated by DBT rules. Project Assistant: B.Sc./B.Tech. / M.Sc. degree with minimum 55% marks in Biotechnology, Botany, Molecular Biology, Bioinformatics, or relevant allied disciplines from a recognized University or Institute.

salary_details.pay_scale: ₹ 32000/- per month + 9% HRA (JRF), ₹20,000/- per month + 9% HRA (PA)
salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellowship: ₹ 32000/- per month + 9% HRA Project Assistant: ₹20,000/- per month + 9% HRA (as per DBT guidelines)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CUP Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CUP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellowship / Project Assistant posts at Central University of Punjab is June 5, 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Junior Research Fellowship post?
faq.answer: For the Junior Research Fellowship position, candidates need a Master’s degree (M.Sc./M.Tech.) with at least 55% marks in relevant Life Sciences fields and must have cleared national-level eligibility tests like CSIR-UGC NET or GATE.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for the CUP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive by the Central University of Punjab.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for both Junior Research Fellowship and Project Assistant positions is 50 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per official DBT rules.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellowship / Project Assistant posts at Central University of Punjab will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant will receive a consolidated salary of ₹20,000/- per month along with 9% House Rent Allowance (HRA), as per DBT guidelines.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates apply through any other mode apart from email?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for this recruitment is strictly via email. Ensure your application is sent to the correct official email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required to be attached with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs with their application.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for CUP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the Central University of Punjab?
faq.answer: The Central University of Punjab is located in Bathinda, Punjab.
